name: Bran Muffins#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the fruit in water until done. Drain.
2. Mix dry ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Add remaining ingredients to the dry mixture and stir until combined.
4. Pour batter into muffin tins, filling them about 2/3 full.
5. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes. If using miniature muffin tins, reduce baking time to 15 minutes.
6. Let cool before removing from the muffin tin.
